keyMetrics.nrr: Not disclosed post go-private; was ~120%+ as public company
keyMetrics.grossMargin: Not disclosed post go-private; was ~70-73% as public company

ipoReadiness: High. Confidential IPO filing reported by The Information (Jan 2026). Thoma Bravo has held ~3.5 years. $1B ARR milestone crossed. Rule of 55 profitability achieved. Key S-1 watch items: (1) NRR recovery, (2) FCF margin, (3) growth rate vs. Pigment/OneStream.

comps.name: Workday
comps.note: Closest public EPM/HCM comp; includes Adaptive Planning (Anaplan's direct FP&A competitor). $53B EV.

comps.name: OneStream (Hg)
comps.note: Most direct EPM pure-play comp. Hg paid $6.4B (~13x 2024 rev). Best precedent transaction for Anaplan re-IPO valuation.

comps.name: Pigment
comps.note: High-growth disruptor displacing Anaplan at mid-market/enterprise. $397M raised; $1B valuation (Series D, Apr 2024, ICONIQ-led). 57% of new revenue from enterprise.

comps.name: Vena Solutions
comps.note: Mid-market EPM; Excel-native. ~$116M ARR (Sacra 2024). Vista Equity-backed. Acquired Acterys Feb 2026.

comps.name: Planful
comps.note: SMB/mid-market FP&A and EPM. Vector Capital-backed. 1,400+ customers. Competes below Anaplan's enterprise tier.

comps.name: Prophix (Hg-backed)
comps.note: Mid-market EPM. Hg (same sponsor as OneStream) backing signals PE consolidation of EPM space.
